posts.text: Screenshot_2026-06-06-13-11-48-82_40deb401b9ffe8e1df2f1cc5ba480b12 1080×2376 289 KB 4.2% stake for 51.39 cr pegs the valuation of the target entity at 1223 crores - with TTM revenues of 1762 cr - this acquisition for a small non controlling stake is done at ~ 0.7 x Sales - While SIS trades at half of that 0.37x TTM sales. Not a good buy IMO considering this is a very similar business to SIS
